_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Build and maintain operational and mission data in a target tracker.
reference_document_element_description: Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance threshold definitions, drift detection protocols, incident reporting procedures, and remediation timelines.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-003 (AI, cosine: 0.496), DQ-T-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.284). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [build, data, maintain, mission, operational, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.883, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (65.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Build and maintain operational and mission data in a target tracker." and "Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance thresho". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 > STS 0.284 (gap +0.234). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [build, data, maintain, mission, operational, target]. WIDAI terms: [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish].
